description: A customer needs to cancel their upcoming hotel reservation.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's reservation using their confirmation number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly locates the specified reservation.

nodes.task_description: Check the cancellation policy to determine if a refund is applicable.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the reservation is within the free cancellation window.

nodes.task_description: Process the cancellation and inform the customer about the refund process.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully cancels the booking and provides a cancellation number.
